title: API
excerpt: description: Access R2 storage through the S3-compatible API, Workers API, or Cloudflare REST API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 provides three API surfaces for interacting with your data: * **[Workers API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/api/workers/workers-api-reference/):** An in-Worker API accessed by binding an R2 bucket to a [Worker](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/). Use the Workers API to read, write, and list objects from within a Worker.
